snippet.title: DEATH AWAITS | Marathon Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny.  

Marathon releases March 5, 2026.  

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save.

Learn more: https://www.bungie.net/7/en/News/Article/marathon-server-slam

Pre-order Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. Play with your crew, as a solo Runner, or form uneasy alliances with proximity chat. Scavenge, buildcraft, and take on greater challenges–culminating with the derelict Marathon ship hanging above.

*Gameplay requires internet access and paid-for subscription on console (sold separately)

snippet.title: Life | Sheera Jasvir (4k Official Video) New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026 | New Song
snippet.description:
Life” is a powerful Punjabi track about living and working in foreign countries, the struggles, long shifts, tuition stress, missing family, and the nonstop grind to build a better future. This song represents everyone who works hard away from home, staying strong through tough times and never giving up.

The lyrics capture the reality behind the dream, early mornings, late nights, empty pockets, and big responsibilities. It reflects the mindset of people who leave their comfort zone to create something bigger for themselves and their families.

With emotional vibes and meaningful words, “Life” connects to anyone who understands sacrifice, ambition, and the true meaning of hustle. If you relate to the grind, this one’s for you.

Song - Life  
Singer Composer - Sheera Jasvir

[Verse 1]
I've seen the world, done it all
Had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
 
[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Verse 2]
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now

[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face and electric soul

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Bridge]
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that You'll let him in
Father, tell me if You can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds

[Chorus]
And will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothin' but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Outro]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me when I'm not young and beautiful?
